productDisplayName: Fila Men's Round Neck Yellow Black T-shirt
description: CompositionYellow round neck t-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, with short sleeves, a ribbed neck, flock print on the front with branding and brand badge on left hemFitRegularWash care Machine wash cold Warm iron Do not tumble dry Do not bleach Wash dark colours separately Dry in shade Do not iron on print Created for comfort and style, this t-shirt from fila's Flatlining Collection celebrating the brand's 100 years, is perfect for the tennis star in you. Made of a cotton and polyester blend fabric, it is designed to keep you fresh and comfortable all day, while the print of a speeding tennis ball across the chest enhances your sportive style quotient. Team this tee with jeans and tennis shoes off the court and with performance shorts when striking those winning aces.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
